_doc: Harness feature flags. SOFT keys: override per-machine in state/features.local.json (gitignored) or via `harness features set <key> <value>`. LOCKED keys (the safety ones: guards.*.block, guards.worktree_isolation.bash_scanner, guards.worktree_session.ttl_seconds) are read ONLY from THIS committed file -- the enforcement guard protects it from agent edits, so a human flips them here (tracked in git) or uses the env hatch. An agent CANNOT self-weaken a guard via the local file. See memory/decisions/0008-feature-flags-config.md.
_env_hatches: Independent of this file and unchanged: HARNESS_ALLOW_CROSS_WORKTREE=1 (one-off disable Guard A) and HARNESS_ALLOW_MULTI_SESSION=1 (one-off disable Guard B).
